MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT JAYANT AGARWAL, M.D.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Edward B. Chatoian, II, Esq. of Law Office of Edward B. Chatoian 559/485-0101 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); Anil Pai, Esq. of McCormick, Barstow, Sheppard, Wayte & Carruth LLP 559/433-1300 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO BREACH AND CAUSATION. In addition, the Court ruled on defendant's objections to evidence, all overruled. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER on motion.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
Appearances: Hilary E. Youngblood of Davidovitz & Bennett, LLP (956.4800) for defendant and moving party.
No other appearances. Ms. Youngblood provided the court with a copy of the proof of service. The court granted defendant's motion for summary judgment. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
